text.value: Name: Age: years Contact person: House number: Kitongoji: IPO futa:

As a CHV, you are responsible for making sure that you are providing the community with health education and services while trying to take precautions to stop the transmission of Corona virus to one another. Therefore, make sure you consider the following while you conduct the visits: • Wash your hands with soap/sanitizer as many time as you can while at home, once you are at the client's house and when you leave. • Keep a 2 meters distance while talking to your clients. • Don't shake hands with your clients. • Avoid group gatherings. • Provide the service at the open space and if it should be inside, make sure the windows and doors are open. • Cover your mouth with a towel or elbow when you sneeze or cough. • Do not go for a visit if you have symptoms of fever, cough or frequent sneezing. • Please remember to do the covid education visit before or after submitting this form.
Precautionary measures when visiting a client
Now I will ask you some questions about pregnancy danger signs. Have you experienced any of these symptoms?
To be answered by the CHV
Fever and being too weak to get out of bed
This woman is experiencing or has experienced an emergency danger sign. Urge the woman and her family to get the woman medical help as the lives of the mother and her baby are potentially in danger.
No emergency referral condition was identified.
OBSERVE: if the client has the following pregnancy danger signs.
Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user

During the enrolment we talked about pregnancy risk factors. I want to make sure that you are aware of these factors and know what to do to lower your risk if you identify any. Therefore, I will visit you every two weeks, in addition to the regular pregnancy visits, to make sure you continue in good health and have a safe pregnancy all the way through delivery.
Do you understand the importance of Facility Delivery ?
Do you understand the importance of ANC Visits ?
Do you understand the importance of Rest ?
Do you understand the importance of Balanced Diet/Good Nutrition Practices ?
Do you understand the importance of No heavy work ?
Do you understand the importance of Family Planning ?
Do you understand the importance of Risks of using herbs ?
What can you do to continue in good health and have a safe pregnancy all the way through delivery?
I would now like to go through the things you can do to continue in good health and have a safe pregnancy all the way through delivery
What can you do to continue in good health and have a safe pregnancy all the way through delivery?
I would now like to go through the things you can do to continue in good health and have a safe pregnancy all the way through delivery.
Do you feel the baby moving on a daily basis, at least every six hours?

Now you are at the stage of comparing your palm with the client's palm. Before doing this, please keep a 2 meters distance from your client as a precautionary measure to avoid the spread of Corona virus. Please ask your client to show you their palm while still keeping the distance.
I am referring you to a health facility because I have identified that you have danger sign(s)
Based on our conversation, I did not identify any health issues, but if you develop any of the signs we discussed today, you should go to a health facility immediately
Does the client have pallor? Compare your palm with client's palm. If client's palms are paler than yours, this is pallor.
Early labor pain before 9 months gestation
Signs of malaria (feeling cold, fever, vomiting)
Swelling of face, arms, fingers, or legs

Continue with the following questions. Indicate if the client has any of the following common pregnancy issues.
Have you experienced:
I am referring you to a health facility because I have identified that you have danger sign(s)
Anemia [received tablets, or didn't receive because out of stock/too expensive/don't know]
Big baby in previous or current (more than 4 kg)
Advise to deliver at higher-level facility
Last pregnancy 10 or more years ago
Which pregnancy risk factors do you remember?
To address emergency pregnancy danger signs
To address other pregnancy danger signs
You need to go to the health facility for the following reasons:
I will visit you again in two weeks.
Signs of malaria (feeling cold, fever, vomiting)
Swelling of face, arms, fingers, or legs
Early labor pain before 9 months gestation
Big baby in previous or current (more than 4 kg)
Anemia [received tablets, or didn't receive because out of stock/too expensive/don't know]
Advise to deliver at higher-level facility
Last pregnancy 10 or more years ago
Tarehe ya mwisho ya tembeleo:
Jina: Umri: miaka Mtu wa karibu kwa mawasiliano: Namba ya nyumba: Kitongoji:

Kama mhudumu wa afya ya jamii, una jukumu la kuhakikisha unatoa elimu ya afya ya jamii na huduma huku ukijikinga ili kuepusha kusambaa kwa maambukizi ya korona kutoka kwa mtu mmoja kwenda kwa mwengine. Hivyo hakikisha unazingatia yafuatayo wakati ukiwa unatoa huduma: • Osha mikono yako kwa maji na sabuni au kutumia vitakasa mikono mara nyingi kadiri unavyoweza ukiwa nyumbani kwako,nyumbani kwa mteja wako na pindi ukimaliza kutoa huduma. • Hakikisha kuna umbali wa mita mbili kati yako na mteja wako unayeenda kumtembelea • Pindi ukiongea na wateja wako , usishikane mikono. • Epuka mikusanyiko. • Toa huduma katika maeneo yaliyo wazi na ikitokea ukafanya ndani hakikisha milango na madirisha yanakuwa wazi. • Funika mdomo wako kwa kitambaa au kiwiko unavyooenda chafya au kukohoa. • Tafadhali usiende kutoa huduma ukijihisi na dalili za homa na kukohoa na kwenda chafya kwa wingi. • Tafadhali kumbuka kufungua fomu ya kuwaelimsiha wanakaya juu ya maambukizi ya korona na jinsi ya kuchukua tahadhari. Tembeleo kuhusu korona unaweza kulifanya kabla ya kuanza tembeleo lako au mara baada ya kumaliza tembeleo lako hili.
Hatua za kuchukua pindi unapoenda kumtembelea mteja wako
Sahivi naomba kukuliza maswali yanayohusiana na dalili za hatari kwa ujauzito. Je una dalizi za hatari kati ya hizi zifuatazo?
Kupumua kwa haraka au ugumu katika kupumua
Mwanamke huyu anadalili za hatari au aliwahi kupata dalili za hatari za ghafla. Mtake Mama na familia yake kupata msaada wa kimatibabu kwasababu maisha ya mama na mtoto wake yapo katika hatari.
Kwa sasa, hauna dalili yoyote ya hatari iliyogundulika. Lakini ukipata dalili yote kati ya hizi tulizozijadili, tafadhali nenda kituo cha afya haraka iwezakanavyo.
ANGALIA: kama mteja ana dalili za hatari kwa wajawazito hizi zifuatazo.

Wakati wa usajili, tulizungumza kuhusu sababu za hatari za ujauzito. Nataka nihakikishe kwamba unazijua sababu hizo ili kuwe na uwezekano mdogo sana wa kuja kuzipata. Kwahiyo, nitakuja kukutembela kila baada ya wiki mbili ili kuhakikisha unaendelea vizuri na mimba yako hadi utakapojifungua.
Je unaelewa umuhimu wa Kujifungulia kituo cha afya ?
Je unaelewa umuhimu wa Kuhudhuria kliniki wakati wa ujauzito ?
Je unaelewa umuhimu wa Kula vyakula vyenye virutubisho ?
Je unaelewa umuhimu wa Kutokufanya kazi ngumu ?
Je unaelewa umuhimu wa Kutumia uzazi wa mpango ?
Je unaelewa umuhimu wa Hatari za kutumia dawa za mitishamba ?
Mkakati wa kuepuka sababu za hatari za ujauzito
Huwezi kuchaguwa "Hakuna moja wapo" na chaguo jengine
Unaweza kufanya mambo gani ili uweze kuendelea na mimba yako vizuri hadi utakapojifungua?
Sasa, nitakufahamisha mambo ambayo yatakuwezesha kuendelea na mimba yako vizuri hadi utakapojifungua.
Ukizingatia sababu zifuatazo za hatari za ujauzito: []
Mkakati wa kuepuka sababu za hatari za ujauzito
Unaweza kufanya mambo gani ili uweze kuendelea na mimba yako vizuri hadi utakapojifungua?
Sasa, nitakufahamisha mambo ambayo yatakuwezesha kuendelea na mimba yako vizuri hadi utakapojifungua.
Mkakati wa kuepuka sababu za hatari za ujauzito
Je unahisi mtoto anacheza angalau kila baada ya masaa sita kila siku?

Sasa upo kwenye hatua ya kulinganisha kiganja chako na cha mteja wako. Kabla ya kufanya hivyo, tafadhali hakikisha umekaa umbali wa mita mbili na mteja wako ili kujilinda na uwezekano wa kusambaza maambukizi ya Korona. Tafadhali mwambie mteja akuoneshe kiganja chake.
Nakupa rufaa uende kituo cha afya kwasababu nimekugundua una dalili za hatari.
Huna dalili yoyote ya hatari lakini ikitokea ukapatwa na moja ya dalili tulizozijadili unapaswa kwenda kituo cha afya.
Linganisha kiganja chako na cha mteja. Ikiwa kiganja cha mteja kimepauka sana kuliko chako hili ni tatizo. Iniashiria upungufu wa damu.
Uchungu wa mapema kabla ya miezi tisa
kutoa uchafu wenye harufu mbaya sehemu za siri
Kichwa kuuma sana sehemu ya mbele
Dalili za malaria(kuhisi baridi,homa na kutapika)
Huwezi kuchaguwa "Hakuna moja wapo" na chaguo jengine
Endelea na maswali yafuatayo. Angalia kama mteja ana moja kati ya matatizo haya yafuatayo yanayohusu ujauzito:
Nakupa rufaa uende kituo cha afya kwasababu nimekugundua una dalili za hatari.
Mwenwa hajatoa ruhusa ya kujifungua kituo cha afya
Kutokwa na damu nyingi kabla ya kujifungua
Kujifungua mtoto mkubwa ( zaidi ya kilo 4) (mimba hii au kabla)
Mtoto kutanguliza makalio Mtoto kutokeza makalio wakati wa kuzaliwa kawaida atokee kichwa ili azae salama.
Maradhi ya moyo Haya ni maradhi sugu ambapo moyo hushindwa kufanya kazi vizuri na tujuwe kwamba moyo ni kiungo kinacho sambaza damu safi kwenda sehemu zote za mwili
Kifafa cha mimba Mama akipata tatizo hili hukutika mfano wa homa ya mdudu na kupoteza faham, kifafa cha mimba hutokea kabla au baada ya mama kujifungua.
Kushauriwa kujifungua katika kituo cha afya kikubwa
Kuchanika njia ya uzazi(karibia ya njia ya choo kikubwa)
Milalo mibaya Kutokea akiwa na mlalo usio wa kawaida wakati wa mtoto kuzaliwa
Kutokwa damu nyingi baada ya kujifungua
Kujifungua kwa kusaidiwa kuvutwa na mashine
Uchungu wa muda mrefu( Zaidi ya masaa 12)
Seli mundu Maradhi ya homa ya mifupa/seli nundu, mwenye maradhi haya chembe chembe nyekundu za damu huwa kidogo na hazikukamilika, hupekelea kuwa na ukosefu wa damu mara kwa mara
Mimba iliyopita ilikuwa miaka kumi ilopita au zaidi
Huwezi kuchaguwa "Hakuna moja wapo" na chaguo jengine
Je unakumbuka sababu zipi za hatari za ujauzito?
Ili kushughulikia dalili za hatari za dharura za mama mjamzito.
Ili kushughulikia dalili nyengine za hatari.
Unatakiwa uende kituo cha afya kutokana na sababu zifuatazo:
Nitakutembelea tena baada ya wiki mbili.
Hatari za kutumia dawa za mitishamba
Dalili za malaria(kuhisi baridi,homa na kutapika)
kutoa uchafu wenye harufu mbaya sehemu za siri
Kichwa kuuma sana sehemu ya mbele
Uchungu wa mapema kabla ya miezi tisa
Kujifungua mtoto mkubwa ( zaidi ya kilo 4) (mimba hii au kabla)
Kujifungua kwa kusaidiwa kuvutwa na mashine
Kushauriwa kujifungua katika kituo cha afya kikubwa
Mwenwa hajatoa ruhusa ya kujifungua kituo cha afya
Mimba iliyopita ilikuwa miaka kumi ilopita au zaidi
Uchungu wa muda mrefu( Zaidi ya masaa 12)
Kuchanika njia ya uzazi(karibia ya njia ya choo kikubwa)
Kutokwa na damu nyingi kabla ya kujifungua
Kutokwa damu nyingi baada ya kujifungua

bind.calculate: if(selected( /pregnancy_counselling/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_1/danger_sign_vaginal_bleeding ,"yes") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_2/danger_sign_convulsions ,"yes") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_2/danger_sign_unconsciouss ,"yes") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_1/danger_sign_severe_headache ,"yes") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_1/danger_sign_fever ,"yes") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_1/danger_sign_abdominal_pain ,"yes") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_2/danger_sign_difficult_breathing ,"yes"),1,0)

bind.relevant: selected( /pregnancy_counselling/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_2/danger_sign_convulsions ,'no') and selected( /pregnancy_counselling/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_2/danger_sign_unconsciouss ,'no') and selected( /pregnancy_counselling/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_1/danger_sign_severe_headache ,'no') and selected( /pregnancy_counselling/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_1/danger_sign_fever ,'no') and selected( /pregnancy_counselling/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_1/danger_sign_abdominal_pain ,'no') and selected( /pregnancy_counselling/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_2/danger_sign_difficult_breathing ,'no') and selected( /pregnancy_counselling/danger_signs/danger_sign_table_1/danger_sign_vaginal_bleeding ,'no')

bind.calculate: if(selected( /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"difficulty_breathing") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"fatigue") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"fever") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"tinrisk_factor_namess") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"dizziness") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"frontal_headache") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"blurred_vision") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"gastric_pain") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"swelling") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"early_labor") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"liquid_leaking") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"malaria_signs") or selected( /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/pregnancy_issues ,"foul_smelling")1,0)

bind.relevant: /pregnancy_counselling/danger_signs/emergency_danger_sign_referral = 0 and /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/pregnancy_and_pallor/refer_pregnancy_complications =0 and /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/subgroup_pregnancy_issues/refer_pregnancy_issues =0 and selected( /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/pregnancy_and_pallor/baby_moving ,"yes") and selected( /pregnancy_counselling/pregnancy_issues_group/pregnancy_and_pallor/pallor ,"no")
